rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings
Ensure AGREE assumptions and guarantees refer to valid component ports in appropriate scopes
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component names, ports, and connections are defined in the AADL model and must be referenced by their exact identifiers
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
